channel.title: Echo Thread Podcast
channel.description: Track-by-track Lily Roo conversations, starting with Analog Myth.
channel.itunes:author: Lily Roo

item.title: Analog Myth: The Clock Cannot Explain This
item.description: Jasper Fields sits down with Lily Roo for a track-by-track talk-through of Analog Myth, the eight-song album arriving July 1, 2026.
item.content:encoded:
Jasper Fields sits down with Lily Roo for a track-by-track talk-through of Analog Myth, the eight-song album arriving July 1, 2026.

The conversation moves through social anxiety, girls camp, analog clocks, tea as repetition, tiny-house freedom, cruise-ship bowling, slow walking, and carrying light back into the same room.

Album page: https://www.lilyroo.com/analog-myth.html
item.itunes:author: Lily Roo
item.itunes:subtitle: A track-by-track conversation for Analog Myth.
item.itunes:summary: Jasper Fields sits down with Lily Roo for a track-by-track talk-through of Analog Myth, the eight-song album arriving July 1, 2026.
